assay: 10x Chromium Single Cell 3' Gene Expression amplified cDNA — baseline Oxford Nanopore direct-ligation simulation

findings.title: TSO concatemers / fused reads (internal adapter2)

evidence.note: an internal adapter2/TSO copy is the hallmark of a fused/concatemer read

findings.detail: 2.7% of reads carry an internal TSO/adapter2 signature (template-switch concatemer or two fused cDNAs). Fix: split reads at internal TSO junctions (computational). At the bench, the optional enriched profile — full-length biotinylated-primer streptavidin pull-down (ONT SST_9198) — depletes such artifacts; the baseline direct-ligation prep does not.

findings.title: Stranding / read classification
findings.detail: 99.9% of reads classified; 94.5% full-length (both flanks); orientation 50% forward. Categories: {'full_length': 36777, 'adapter2_only': 1479, 'unclassified': 30, 'fused_or_concatemer': 1074, 'adapter1_only': 640}.

findings.title: R1-derived handle detected near read end
findings.detail: R1 handle detected in 96.1% of reads (handle detection ≠ barcode recovery).

findings.title: Extractable cell barcode + UMI

evidence.note: handle-anchored 16 bp CB + 12 bp UMI probe

findings.detail: CB+UMI extractable in 96.1% of reads (whitelist match not evaluated here).

findings.title: Long-read length distribution
findings.detail: n=40,000, median 1460 bp, N50 1849 bp, max 2639 bp.
